page: Google Cloud Platform n1-highmem-96 is a memory-optimized server configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs and 624 GB of RAM, running on the x86_64 architecture. The processing power is delivered by Intel Xeon processors, featuring 48 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, providing two threads per core. The processor configuration includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 38 MB of L3 cache. This instance does not include any local NVMe storage or GPU accelerators, and it comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is weak, as evidenced by a stress-ng single-core score of 1115.58 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1053.0. Conversely, multi-core performance is strong, with stress-ng multi-core reaching 70276.9. Memory bandwidth is a primary strength of this hardware profile, demonstrating strong performance with a cached small-block read speed of 3917.68 GB/sec and an uncached large-block read speed of 220.79 GB/sec.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 6.5 GB per core and strong multi-core capabilities, this server is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and multi-threaded tasks such as software compilation. However, it presents a clear tradeoff for workloads dependent on single-threaded execution speed, such as gzip compression or bzip3 single-threaded decompression, where performance is weak. It offers a resource-dense profile for parallelized, memory-bound enterprise applications.
description: Google Cloud Platform n1-highmem-96 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 physical cores, and 624 GB of RAM. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. While single-core benchmarks indicate weak performance, the server delivers strong multi-core processing and exceptional memory bandwidth, reaching 3917.68 GB/sec for cached reads. This profile is optimized for memory-intensive databases and multi-threaded workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n1-highmem-96 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 96 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 624 GB RAM, and strong multi-core and memory bandwidth performance for database workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n1-highmem-96 features 96 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 624 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized server featuring ninety-six dedicated vCPUs and strong multi-core performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

Strong multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Suited for memory-intensive databases and multi-threaded workloads
